title: Test the Trial Corner behavior on the last day of the trial
description: Tests the copy and functionality when the trial has less than 24 hours remaining.
preconditions: User has an active trial with < 24 hours remaining.
User is in the Trial Corner cohort.

steps.description: 1. Log in and view the homepage widget.
4. Observe the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle.

expected_result: The copy should reflect the urgency, possibly showing 'Trial ends today' or hours/minutes remaining. The 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle should be disabled or hidden, as the 24-hour window has passed.
